title.en: China-to-Togo Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入多哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入多哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Togo ARSE renewable-energy authorization, CEET/CEB grid-connection expectations, national conformity and IEC-aligned standards context, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, donor/lender project equipment gates, and West Africa high-temperature/dust derating — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与多哥ARSE可再生能源授权、CEET/CEB并网要求、国家合格评定及IEC协调标准背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用事业接口、IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数、捐助方/贷款方项目设备门槛及西非高温/粉尘降额——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與多哥ARSE可再生能源授權、CEET/CEB併網要求、國家合格評定及IEC協調標準背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用事業接口、IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數、捐助方/貸款方項目設備門檻及西非高溫/粉塵降額——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Togo national conformity scope determination, ARSE authorization or licensing decision, CEET/CEB grid-connection approval, donor procurement eligibility determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Togo standardization and conformity rules, ARSE renewable-energy authorization requirements, CEET/CEB connection procedures, donor/lender equipment specifications, and applicable IEC standards with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、多哥国家合格评定范围裁定、ARSE授权或许可决定、CEET/CEB并网审批、捐助方采购资格裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行多哥标准化和合格评定规则、ARSE可再生能源授权要求、CEET/CEB并网程序、捐助方/贷款方设备规格及适用IEC标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、多哥國家合格評定範圍裁定、ARSE授權或許可決定、CEET/CEB併網審批、捐助方採購資格裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行多哥標準化和合格評定規則、ARSE可再生能源授權要求、CEET/CEB併網程序、捐助方/貸款方設備規格及適用IEC標準。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Togo, the key practical points are: (1) Togo uses the same 50 Hz 220/380 V nominal grid voltage as China, so the voltage-setting gap is smaller than in 240/415 V markets; (2) this does not make Chinese GB/T evidence automatically acceptable — ARSE authorization, CEET/CEB connection approval, national conformity review, and project-owner or donor/lender specifications remain separate gates; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence are the practical evidence package for grid-tied PV inverter projects; (4) Togo's solar push, including Blitta and rural electrification programmes such as CIZO, often sits in donor/lender procurement environments where IEC reports are expected; (5) high ambient temperature, dust, humidity, and derating should be checked for the actual Togo site. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines should be treated as domestic China evidence, not a substitute for Togo project acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口多哥时，主要实际要点包括：（1）多哥采用与中国相同的50 Hz 220/380 V标称电网电压，因此电压设置差距小于240/415 V市场；（2）这并不意味着中国GB/T证据自动可被接受——ARSE授权、CEET/CEB并网审批、国家合格评定审查以及项目业主或捐助方/贷款方规格仍是独立门槛；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据、IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用事业接口证据和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据，是并网光伏逆变器项目的实际证据包；（4）多哥推动太阳能发展，包括Blitta电站和CIZO等农村电气化计划，常处于捐助方/贷款方采购环境，通常需要IEC报告；（5）须针对多哥实际场址核查高环境温度、粉尘、湿度和降额。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准应视为中国国内证据，而非多哥项目准入的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口多哥時，主要實際要點包括：（1）多哥採用與中國相同的50 Hz 220/380 V標稱電網電壓，因此電壓設置差距小於240/415 V市場；（2）這並不意味著中國GB/T證據自動可被接受——ARSE授權、CEET/CEB併網審批、國家合格評定審查以及項目業主或捐助方/貸款方規格仍是獨立門檻；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據、IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用事業接口證據和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據，是併網光伏逆變器項目的實際證據包；（4）多哥推動太陽能發展，包括Blitta電站和CIZO等農村電氣化計畫，常處於捐助方/貸款方採購環境，通常需要IEC報告；（5）須針對多哥實際場址核查高環境溫度、粉塵、濕度和降額。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準應視為中國國內證據，而非多哥項目准入的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
